understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a grid-based puzzle, modifying the carried piece's shape, color, and rotation by stepping on modifier tiles, in order to match the requirements of goal cells and complete all levels. Completing all goals advances the player to the next level, and winning all levels completes the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each move consumes 1 stamina. Running out of stamina costs a life and resets stamina to its maximum. Losing all lives ends the game. Walls block movement; 'blocked_directions' indicates impassable directions. Shape modifiers cycle the piece through 6 shapes. Color modifiers cycle through orange, blue, green, red. Rotation modifiers rotate the piece 90° clockwise through 0, 90, 180, 270 degrees. A goal cell activates when the piece's shape, color, and rotation all match the goal's requirements. Stepping on an activated goal completes it. The player must plan routes carefully to avoid wasting stamina on blocked moves or unnecessary steps.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a grid-based puzzle, modifying the carried piece's shape, color, and rotation by stepping on modifier tiles, in order to match the requirements of goal cells and complete all levels. Completing all goals advances the player to the next level, and winning all levels completes the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each move consumes 1 stamina. Running out of stamina costs a life and resets stamina to its maximum. Losing all lives ends the game. Walls block movement; 'blocked_directions' indicates impassable directions. Shape modifiers cycle the piece through 6 shapes. Color modifiers cycle through orange, blue, green, red. Rotation modifiers rotate the piece 90° clockwise through 0, 90, 180, 270 degrees. A goal cell activates when the piece's shape, color, and rotation all match the goal's requirements. Stepping on an activated goal completes it. The player must plan routes carefully to avoid wasting stamina on blocked moves or unnecessary steps.
